name: @oneworks/plugin-china-red-theme
description: An optional China Edition theme pack for OneWorks.

descriptionI18n.en: An optional China Edition theme pack with warm paper surfaces, gold borders, component overrides, and a playful banner.
descriptionI18n.zh-Hans: 可选的中国方案主题包，包含暖宣纸表面、金色边框、组件样式覆盖和整活横幅。
